name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
hint: One of the largest carnivorous dinosaurs with sharp teeth and tiny arms.

name: Velociraptor
hint: A small and fast carnivorous dinosaur known for its intelligence and sharp claws.

name: Triceratops
hint: A large herbivorous dinosaur with a frilled head and three horns on its face.

name: Stegosaurus
hint: A herbivorous dinosaur with plates on its back and spikes on its tail.

name: Brachiosaurus
hint: One of the largest dinosaurs with a long neck and a small head.

name: Ankylosaurus
hint: A heavily armored herbivorous dinosaur with a clubbed tail for defense.

name: Pteranodon
hint: A flying reptile with a wingspan of up to 30 feet.

name: Parasaurolophus
hint: A duck-billed dinosaur with a long crest on its head.

name: Diplodocus
hint: A long-necked herbivorous dinosaur with a whip-like tail.

name: Allosaurus
hint: A large carnivorous dinosaur with sharp teeth and clawed hands.
